Name: Pattern Recognition - PE

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: B2 has the same order retrieve scan place align preheat pick welding tool weld A weld B measure weld integrity apply coating dry coating visual check So the sequence is consistent across cases

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Apply protective coating and Dry coating are both steps related to applying and curing the protective layer on the parts surface which occurs after structural assembly is complete and validated

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: High Level Step 4 Final Quality Inspection

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The visual check is done after coating and drying so its a final inspection of the complete part

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Grouping the in process check with the step it is validating is more meaningful because it represents the full assembly phase including validation

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Temporal proximity also supports the grouping and resource grouping shows distinct phases material prep resources welding and weld check resources finishing resources and final inspection resource

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The AdditionalInfo is also consistent within each group which supports the grouping

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: Could the preheat be part of the assembly step

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: No because preheating the metal sheet is a pre weld preparation step so its part of material preparation not the welding assembly step

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: The grouping is based on temporal sequence logical process flow resource specialization and the purpose of the activities

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Inferred Grouping Rules from the sample log consistent across cases Group events that are sequential temporally close and part of the same logical manufacturing phase Include preparatory actions for a core phase activity in the same group as the core activity Include in process quality checks that are specific to the core activity of the phase in the same group Group events performed by the same specialized resource type or dedicated equipment for a phase together Group events that modify the same aspect of the part into distinct phases

Name: Validation - PE
Text: All 12 events from the sample are accounted for in the four groups
